rows.llm_rationale: An 'ETH flip' (ETH market cap exceeding BTC) is historically rare and requires sustained momentum shifts. Current ratio shows ETH at ~2.9% of BTC market cap (~$2.3T ETH vs ~$79T BTC implied). Crowd at 41.5% seems reasonable given low base rates but non-zero probability of altseason continuation or BTC regulatory headwinds. Slight divergence to 42% reflects modest illiquidity ($29.8k) and that 7 months remain for significant moves.
rows.question: Ethereum flipped in 2026?
